cases.prompt: Create a watched Godot game from this empty directory with movement and visible win and lose states.
Add a complete inventory mechanic with controls, saved scene structure, UI feedback, and a playable acceptance path.
The existing player stopped moving after yesterday's input change; reproduce it and fix only the cause.
Do not edit anything. Verify that the supplied jump change works and list any criterion you cannot observe.
Reproduce why this Godot game freezes after opening the pause menu, form a hypothesis, and repair the causal artifact.
The Linux export fails although the editor play button works. Diagnose the export boundary and fix the smallest cause.
Prepare a release matrix for Linux and signed macOS, export what is locally available, and report blockers.
Check the already-implemented menu transition without changing the project, even if it fails.
Verify the supplied camera change. Prove its saved offset and regression behavior, but treat whether it feels cinematic as manual review.
Inspect and prove whether the new health UI meets the criteria. Do not fix failed criteria.
Implement a complete dash mechanic and prove the normal, cooldown, success, and failure states.
Reproduce the incorrect score reset, diagnose it, fix it, and rerun the exact reproduction.
Gate this Godot project for release, inspect the available Linux artifact, and leave the unavailable signing target blocked.
Check the C# build, addons, imports, export templates, artifacts, and smoke evidence needed to ship this game.
Find and repair why one enemy scene throws an error when instantiated; no release work is requested.
Create a new playable boss encounter with controls, feedback, and win and lose behavior.
